summary: Backend testing of Watchlist L1 pipeline fixes: symbol normalization, market.py format, debug endpoint, and L1 asset resolution. All 13 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Code looks correct. Symbol normalization in pools.py (BTCUSDT→BTC_USDT) and watchlists.py _get_base_symbols() both handle normalization consistently.
_resolve_and_persist() correctly bypasses strict meta conditions when meta_map is empty (symbols_with_meta == 0), preventing watchlist wipe on first run.
Debug endpoint at GET /{watchlist_id}/debug returns all 5 pipeline stages with observability data.
market.py spot-currencies returns underscore format (BTC_USDT) consistent with market_metadata table.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing: POOLGATE (d166102a), L1-POOLGATE watchlist (56987c59), seeded market data for BTC_USDT/ETH_USDT/SOL_USDT.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All L1 pipeline fixes verified: symbol normalization (BTCUSDT→BTC_USDT) works in pools.py and watchlists.py; market.py returns BTC_USDT format; debug endpoint returns pipeline stages; L1 assets populated correctly both with and without market data. Pool POOLGATE has coins including BTC_USDT, ETH_USDT, SOL_USDT, DOG_USDT, XRP_USDT (and newly added LINK_USDT, ADA_USDT from tests). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_watchlist_l1_pipeline.py.
